## Findings
- [ ] **[Coverage/WARN] Patch coverage of unreleased diff is below 80%**
  - **Status quo:** Only 60.6% of changed production lines in v0.1.6..HEAD are covered by tests. Several changed files have patch coverage below 50%.
  - **Likely cause:** Recent SSRF-hardening and pipeline changes added defensive branches that are not fully exercised by the new regression tests.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add targeted tests for the uncovered branches listed below before the next release.
  - **Uncovered:**
    - `cmd/symfetch/main.go:221-226` (CLI flag/config override handling)
    - `cmd/symfetch/main.go:233,242-243,249,255-256` (batch/config init paths)
    - `internal/cache/cache.go:11` (new import used by reconcileIndex)
    - `internal/cache/cache.go:55-58,70` (reconcileIndex scan/rebuild paths)
    - `internal/cache/cache.go:99-103` (cache key version/content-key handling)
    - `internal/cache/index.go:98-100,117-118,128-129,138` (rebuild/upsert accounting paths)
    - `internal/fetch/azuretls.go:179-183` (SSRF post-fetch FinalURL validation)
    - `internal/fetch/guard.go:79,81-82` (ControlSSRF dialer paths)
    - `internal/fetch/honest.go:8,20-21,48-55,58-59,122,142-145,147,152-156,162-170` (honest-client SSRF redirect/proxy/dialer paths)
    - `internal/pipeline/pipeline.go:90-92,96,113-114,130,144,146-155` (cache discard, robots error, materialize error, AllowPrivate propagation)
    - `internal/robots/robots.go:63-72` (robots SSRF guard application)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Medium effort / medium impact

## Non-issues
- Test files are excluded from patch coverage (Go coverage profiles do not instrument test code as production code).
- Overall coverage improved by 13.0 percentage points versus v0.1.6, so this is not a regression.
